queries.question: For each pesticide, give me the name of the ingredients of that pesticide
queries.sql: select pesticides.name , ingredients.ingredient_name from Pesticides_Ingredients join Ingredients on Pesticides_Ingredients.ingredient_id = Ingredients.id join Pesticides on Pesticides_Ingredients.pesticide_id = Pesticides.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?ingredient_name WHERE {
  ?pesticides_ingredients a :Pesticides_Ingredients .
  ?ingredients a :Ingredients .
  ?pesticides_ingredients p:hasIngredients ?ingredients .
  ?pesticides a :Pesticides .
  ?pesticides_ingredients p:hasPesticides ?pesticides .
  ?pesticides p:name ?name .
  ?ingredients p:name ?ingredient_name .
}

queries.question: Give me the names of the ingredients in all pesticides
queries.sql: SELECT Ingredients.ingredient_name  from Pesticides_Ingredients join Ingredients on Pesticides_Ingredients.ingredient_id = Ingredients.id join Pesticides on Pesticides_Ingredients.pesticide_id = Pesticides.id   GROUP BY Pesticides_Ingredients.ingredient_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Pesticides_Ingredients.pesticide_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Pesticides)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the names of the ingredients in all pesticides
